title: Bridge Essay: The A52 Breath Method: A Narrative Review of Breathwork for Mental Health and St

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**The A52 Breath Method: A Narrative Review of Breathwork for Mental Health and Stress Resilience.** — Stress Health. PMID: 40792649. DOI: 10.1002/smi.70098. Breathwork - deliberately altering the way one breathes - has gained growing attention as an emerging non-pharmacological intervention for mental health and stress regulation. Anovel yet ancient method that remains largely underexplored in the literature, breathwork requires structured, evidence-based investigation to optimize its application. This review analyses the existing literature on slow, diaphragmatic, nasal breathing and breath-holding techniques, to propose the A52 Breath Method-ath
